Class AbstractSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractPropertiesSettings, ChoiceSettings, FeatureSettings, GeneralSettings, IsabelleTranslationSettings, LemmaGeneratorSettings, NewSMTTranslationSettings, ProofDependentSMTSettings, ProofIndependentSMTSettings, StrategySettings, TermLabelSettings, TestGenerationSettings
public abstract class AbstractSettings extends Object implements Settings

      Description copied from interface: Settings

      propertyName - the name for identification of the property
